entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea, the crop studied for disease resistance

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: Puminia arachidis Speg., a fungal pathogen causing rust disease in peanuts

entities.name: LATE LEAFSPOT
entities.description: Cercospridium personaturn, a fungal pathogen causing late leafspot disease in peanuts

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of peanut genotypes to resist rust disease

entities.name: LATE LEAFSPOT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of peanut genotypes to resist late leafspot disease

entities.name: MULTIPLE DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The combined resistance to both rust and late leafspot diseases

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: The natural environment where disease resistance was studied

entities.name: GLASSHOUSE
entities.description: The controlled environment where late leafspot development was assessed

entities.name: LESION DIAMETER
entities.description: A parameter used to assess the severity of late leafspot

entities.name: DEFOLIATION PERCENTAGE
entities.description: A parameter used to assess the severity of late leafspot

entities.name: SPORULATION
entities.description: A parameter used to assess the severity of late leafspot

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: The process of developing improved peanut genotypes with disease resistance
